exampleSentencesTranslated: I ate rice with chicken for lunch today.
Do you want more rice when eating at the restaurant?
Mom usually cooks rice for the whole family every evening.
notes_md:
**cơm** = cooked rice. It also often means a whole meal (since rice is the base of the meal).

Count with **bát cơm** (bowl of rice), **đĩa cơm** (plate of rice). Don’t confuse with **gạo** = uncooked/raw rice.

Very common in set phrases: **ăn cơm** = have a meal (not just eat rice).
notes:
cơm = cooked rice. It also often means a whole meal (since rice is the base of the meal).

Count with bát cơm (bowl of rice), đĩa cơm (plate of rice). Don’t confuse with gạo = uncooked/raw rice.

Very common in set phrases: ăn cơm = have a meal (not just eat rice).
exampleSentences: Em ăn cơm với thịt gà vào buổi trưa nay.
Anh có muốn thêm cơm khi đi ăn nhà hàng không?
Mẹ thường nấu cơm cho cả gia đình mỗi tối.

example.es: Me gusta comer arroz con pescado.
example.vi: Tôi thích ăn cơm với cá.
example.en: I like to eat rice with fish.

definitions.es: Un alimento básico hecho de granos cocidos, típicamente arroz.
definitions.vi: Một loại thực phẩm chính làm từ hạt đã nấu chín, thường là gạo.
definitions.en: A staple food made from cooked grains, typically rice.
